title: ZKContextTransitionTransaction
description: Schema for a single Zero Knowledge context state update transition transaction (CTT)

sender_identity.description: Identifier of the client application making the contribution

old_state_root.description: Hex encoded 32-byte hash of the previous Context State Root (CSR)

new_state_root.description: Hex encoded 32-byte hash of the proposed Context State Root (CSR)

claim_key.description: The Poseidon hash representing the claim path index inside the Sparse Merkle Tree

proof.description: The cryptographic proof payload validating this transaction transition

proving_scheme.description: The ZK proving system used to generate the proof

public_inputs.description: Public variables that are input directly to the state transition circuit validator

contributor_authority_hash.description: Hash linking the client identity with the authorized public key stored in the SMT
